name: Sōkaku Sofa
subtitle: 3-seater in Natural Oat Linen
description: The Sōkaku (巣格) Sofa takes its name from the Japanese word for 'nested structure.' Each cushion is independently filled with ethically sourced down and natural latex for a sink-in comfort that never loses its form. The frame is solid white oak with hand-applied Danish oil finish — a piece built to outlast trends by decades.
care: Vacuum regularly with soft brush attachment. Spot clean with mild detergent and cool water. Cushion covers are removable and dry-clean only. Professional upholstery cleaning recommended annually.
shipping: White-glove delivery included. 2-person crew deliver to room of choice, assemble, and remove all packaging.
metaDescription: Sōkaku Sofa — 3-seater in Natural Oat Linen. Solid white oak frame, down fill. Crafted in Denmark. From $2,890 — BeautyHome by NODO Studio.
altText: Sōkaku Sofa in natural oat linen with turned oak legs, photographed in a Japandi living room
